title: RocketRide Wave
description: Wave-planning agent built natively on the RocketRide architecture.
Plans each step as a wave of parallel tool calls, uses keyed memory to stay token-efficient,
and requests tool schemas on demand instead of loading them all upfront.
Can be invoked as a tool (`<nodeId>.run_agent`) for hierarchical agent orchestration.

llm.description: LLM used by the agent for planning and synthesis

tool.description: Tools available to the agent (via control-plane invoke)

instructions.title: Instructions
instructions.description: Additional instructions to guide the agent's planning and responses.
